def test_prime_number_returns_itself_as_only_factor():

    expected_factors = [prime_number]
    actual_factors = get_factors(prime_number)
    assert actual_factors == expected_factors, f"Expected factors of {prime_number} to be {expected_factors}, but got {actual_factors}"
